description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set within a walled property featuring extensive landscaping, including palm trees, hedges, and a manicured lawn. The main building is white with flat roofs and large, floor-to-ceiling windows, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property includes a spacious swimming pool, a separate garage structure, a driveway with multiple parked cars, and a backyard play area with a wooden playhouse and swing set. Outdoor amenities such as lounge chairs, a patio, and a shaded pavilion are visible, enhancing the luxurious feel. The perimeter is lined with tall, dense hedges and a solid fence for privacy. The overall layout is open and expansive, with clear zones for recreation, relaxation, and vehicle access.
description: A modern, white flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a pool, landscaped gardens, and multiple outdoor amenities within a fenced property.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated angle, highlighting the pool, main building, and lush landscaping with palm trees and hedges.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a rear perspective, showcasing the backyard play area, patio, and the arrangement of outdoor furniture and structures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the property with the garage, driveway, and additional greenery, emphasizing the privacy provided by the tall hedges.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the front entrance, driveway with parked cars, and the main access gate, giving a clear view of the approach to the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
